title: Sánchez to Trump: Spain won’t ‘applaud those who set the world on fire just because they then show up with a bucket’
summary_full: Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez has emerged as one of the European Union's leading critics of U.S. and Israeli strikes against Iran.
summary_public: Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez has emerged as one of the European Union's leading critics of U.S. and Israeli strikes against Iran.
